_comment: Tier-2: NGSolve HCurl with grad() bilinear form raises NgException 'SymbolicBFI needs scalar-valued CoefficientFunction' — grad(HCurl_basis) is vector-tensor, not scalar, so SymbolicBFI rejects it. Verifies an NGSolve-specific failure mode for an electromagnetics user accidentally applying H1-style grad-grad form on HCurl basis.
